zh.Bramshall, Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Eng: 英國斯塔福爾武托希特
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Stafford於1320年出生在英國斯塔福爾武托希特時，他的父親Sir Ralph Stafford19歲，母親Margaret de Audley10歲。他於1331年與Elizabeth Somerville結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1343年被列為joint warden of the marshes of scotland。他去世於1373年8月在英國武斯特斯爾斯圖布利其享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Stafford于1320年出生在英国斯塔福爾武托希特时，他的父亲Sir Ralph Stafford19岁，母亲Margaret de Audley10岁。他于1331年与Elizabeth Somerville结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1343年被列为joint warden of the marshes of scotland。他去世于1373年8月在英国武斯特斯爾斯圖布利其享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Stafford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Stafford (Staffordshire), but occasionally from other places with similar names, such as Stafford House in Ifield (Sussex), possibly East and West Stowford in East Down (Devon), and three minor places in Devon called Stafford, in Dolton, Broadhembury, and Colyton parishes. The places are all named with Old English ford ‘ford’ as the final element, but have different initial elements. The Staffordshire placename has Old English stæth ‘river bank, shore’; Stafford in Colyton (Devon) has Old English stān ‘stone, rock’; the Sussex placename has Old English stēor ‘steer, bullock’; East and West Stowford (Devon) have Old English stæf ‘staff, stave, rod’; Stafford in Dolton and Stafford in Broadhembury (Devon) may have Old English stæth, stān, or stæf.

variants.name: Stocker
meanings: German and Swiss German (also Stöcker): topographic name for someone living by a tree stump (see Stock 3) or an occupational name for a tree cutter, from Middle High German stocken ‘to clear land’.
German and Swiss German (also Stöcker); Dutch: occupational name from Middle High German, Middle Dutch stocker ‘jailer’.

English: occupational name from Middle English stokker ‘one who sells stockfish’ (fish dried in the air without salt). This was the usual source of the name in medieval London, where a bylaw of 1419 stated that no stokker should board a ship to buy fish (presumably in order to forestall the market).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Stafford was born in 1320, in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, his father, Sir Ralph Stafford, was 19 and his mother, Margaret de Audley, was 10. He married Elizabeth Somerville in 1331. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. In 1343, at the age of 23, his occupation is listed as joint warden of the marshes of scotland. He died in August 1373, in Stourbridge, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Stafford est né en 1320, à Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Ralph Stafford, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Audley, avait 10 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Somerville en 1331. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. En 1343, à l’âge de 23 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est joint warden of the marshes of scotland. Il est décédé en août 1373, à Stourbridge, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Stafford 1320 in Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Ralph Stafford 19 und seine Mutter Margaret de Audley 10. Er hat 1331 Elizabeth Somerville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1343, als er 23 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als joint warden of the marshes of scotland aufgeführt. Er starb im August 1373 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Stourbridge, Worcestershire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Stafford è nato il nel 1320 nel Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Ralph Stafford, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Audley, aveva 10 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Somerville nel 1331. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Nel 1343, all'età di 23 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come joint warden of the marshes of scotland. Morì nel agosto 1373, nel Stourbridge, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Staffordが1320年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアウットオクセターで生まれた時，父Sir Ralph Staffordは19歳，母Margaret de Audleyは10歳であった。1331年にElizabeth Somervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。1343年，23歳の時，職業はjoint warden of the marshes of scotlandと記録されている。彼は1373年8月にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアストウルブリッジで53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Stafford(이)가 1320년 영국 스태퍼드실르 우토세터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Ralph Stafford(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Audley(은)는 10세였다. 그는 1331년 Elizabeth Somerville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1343년, 23세의 나이로 그의 직업은 joint warden of the marshes of scotland이었다. 그는 1373년 8월 영국 워스스터실르 스토우르브리지에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Stafford nasceu em 1320, em Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Ralph Stafford, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Audley, tinha 10 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Somerville em 1331. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Em 1343, com 23 anos, sua profissão aparece como joint warden of the marshes of scotland. Ele faleceu em agosto de 1373, em Stourbridge, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Stafford родился в 1320 г. в местности уттоксетир, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Ralph Stafford было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Audley, 10. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Somerville в 1331 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. В 1343 году, в возрасте 23 лет,  он работал по профессии joint warden of the marshes of scotland. Он умер август 1373 г. в местности стоурбридж, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

sm.between 1339 and 1340: mai le 1339 e o'o I le 1340

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Stafford nació en 1320, en Uttoxeter, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Ralph Stafford, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Margaret de Audley, tenía 10 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Somerville en 1331. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. En 1343, a la edad de 23 años, su ocupación registrada era joint warden of the marshes of scotland. Murió en agosto de 1373, en Stourbridge, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
